name: pctpaymenthookxahau
description: Upon receiving an incoming native XAH payment, automatically forwards a configurable percentage to a destination account.

abi.notes: Percentage-based payment splitter hook. Forwards a configured percentage of incoming native XAH payments to a destination account. Both PCT and DST parameters are actively used in code and validated.

hookParameters.name: PCT
hookParameters.description: Percentage of incoming payment to forward to destination (1-100)
hookParameters.notes: Valid range: 1-100. Values outside this range are rejected. Used in calculation: forward_drops = (drops * pct) / 100

hookParameters.name: DST
hookParameters.description: Destination account to receive forwarded payment
hookParameters.notes: 20-byte account ID. Cannot be the same as the hook account. Validated against hook_account() to prevent self-forwarding.
